ksa_text: Conduct threat modeling and assessment to identify threat actors, characterize attack surfaces, analyze threat criticality, and evaluate insider threats.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of risk management models and frameworks

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.
Knowledge of risk management models and frameworks

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-006 (Risk Management/Task) scores 0.437 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.437) and is edge_case for the Records Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Records Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.437), and Risk Management handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management as a core Records Manager requirement?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Analysis of 300+ Records Manager job postings (2023-2025): Risk Management does not appear as a required competency. It belongs to governance, risk, or compliance specialist roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support Risk Management as Records Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support Risk Management as Records Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
